hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -q '\.env$' && echo '{"continue":false,"stopReason":".env is protected and cannot be modified by Claude"}' || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -q '\.env$' && echo '{"continue":false,"stopReason":".env is protected and cannot be read by Claude"}' || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -q '\.rs$' && cargo check 2>&1 || true
